privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Wenap (https://wenap.app, the "Service") collects, uses, and protects personal information. The operator is the individual/business providing the Service through this website ("we", "us").

sections.title: 1. Information we collect
paragraphs: Account: email, password (stored only as a secure hash), optional referral source.
Usage: tickers analyzed, timestamps, subscription tier, feature usage, device fingerprint (if anti-abuse is enabled), registration IP, and country code from Cloudflare (CF-IPCountry).
Payments: processed by Stripe; we do not store full card numbers—only Stripe customer IDs, subscription status, and billing country where needed.
Communications: emails you send to support@wenap.app.
Technical logs: server errors and webhook summaries for security and reliability.

sections.title: 2. How we use information
paragraphs: To provide, maintain, and improve AI research reports and analysis.
Authentication, email verification, password reset, and subscription management.
Fraud prevention, rate limits, legal compliance, and enforcement of our Terms.
Service emails (verification, quota notices) where permitted.
Aggregated anonymous statistics (e.g. public accuracy page).

sections.title: 3. Third parties
paragraphs: We rely on OpenRouter (AI), Alpha Vantage (market data), Stripe (payments), Resend (transactional email), Render (hosting), and Cloudflare (CDN/DNS/security), each under their own policies.
Content sent to AI models may include your ticker query and report context—do not submit unnecessary sensitive personal data.
We do not sell your email list.

sections.title: 4. Retention
paragraphs: Account data is kept while your account is active; after deletion we may retain or anonymize data as required by law.
Analysis and prediction records may be kept long-term for accuracy tracking with minimal personal linkage.
Stripe billing records follow Stripe and tax retention rules.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
paragraphs: Contact support@wenap.app to access, correct, or delete account-related data where applicable.
Japan residents: handled in line with APPI and related principles.
EEA/UK users (if applicable): rights of access, erasure, restriction, etc., where legally required.

sections.title: 6. Security & cross-border transfers
paragraphs: We use HTTPS, access controls, and standard secret management; absolute security cannot be guaranteed.
Data may be processed in the US, Singapore, or other regions where our providers operate.

sections.title: 7. Cookies & local storage
paragraphs: We use localStorage for login tokens and language preference—not for cross-site ad tracking.
Clearing browser data may require you to sign in again.

sections.title: 8. Minors
paragraphs: The Service is for users aged 18+ (or legal majority in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect data from children.

sections.title: 9. Changes
paragraphs: We may update this policy with a new date on this page. Material changes will be notified reasonably via the site or email. Continued use means acceptance.

sections.title: 10. Contact
paragraphs: Privacy inquiries: support@wenap.app
Website: https://wenap.app

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Wenap (https://wenap.app) you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not register or use the Service.

sections.title: 1. The Service
paragraphs: Wenap provides AI-assisted investment research summaries, scoring, and scenarios for personal learning and reference.
We are not a registered investment adviser, broker-dealer, bank, or financial planner; we do not execute trades, hold assets, or provide personalized investment advice.
Outputs may be wrong, incomplete, or outdated—see the Investment Disclaimer.

sections.title: 2. Accounts
paragraphs: You must provide a valid email and complete verification; keep your password confidential.
No account sharing, bulk fake sign-ups, disposable emails, scraping, reverse engineering, or abuse.
We may suspend or terminate accounts for violations.

sections.title: 3. Subscriptions & payment
paragraphs: Paid plans (Pro / Pro+) bill in USD via Stripe on a recurring basis; prices are shown on the pricing page and Checkout.
Manage payment methods and cancellation via Stripe Customer Portal or our provided links; access typically continues until period end after cancel.
Refunds follow Stripe and our posted policies; statutory withdrawal rights apply where required by law.
Free tiers and referral promotions are as described on the site and may change.

sections.title: 4. Acceptable use
paragraphs: No illegal activity, market manipulation, insider trading, harassment, malware, or IP infringement.
No circumvention of limits, extraction of training data, or mass automated API abuse.
Sharing public report links must not imply our endorsement of your trades.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual property
paragraphs: Site, brand, UI, and our original text belong to us or licensors.
You own your inputs; you grant us a license to store, process, and display them to operate the Service.
Do not resell Service output or republish it as professional research.

sections.title: 6. Disclaimer & limitation of liability
paragraphs: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of accuracy, uptime, or fitness for a particular investment goal.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, consequential, or trading losses; total liability is capped at fees you paid us in the prior 12 months (zero for free-only users).
Limits do not apply where exclusion is unlawful (e.g. fraud).

sections.title: 7. Indemnity
paragraphs: You will indemnify us for reasonable losses arising from your breach of these Terms or misuse of the Service, where permitted by law.

sections.title: 8. Termination
paragraphs: You may stop using the Service anytime; we may suspend for maintenance, risk, or legal reasons.
Surviving clauses remain in effect.

sections.title: 9. Governing law & disputes
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan, without regard to conflict rules (mandatory consumer protections may apply).
Disputes: good-faith negotiation first; otherwise exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court as court of first instance (we may also sue where law allows in your residence).

sections.title: 10. Miscellaneous
paragraphs: These Terms, the Privacy Policy, Investment Disclaimer, and pricing page form the agreement.
Contact: support@wenap.app

disclaimerPage.title: Investment Disclaimer
disclaimerPage.intro: Read carefully before using Wenap. This page supplements the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Not investment advice
paragraphs: Scores, signals (e.g. buy/hold/sell), price scenarios, probability estimates, and bull/bear debates are model outputs and information summaries—not investment advice, offers, or recommendations in any jurisdiction.
We have not assessed your financial situation, experience, risk tolerance, or objectives. You alone are responsible for investment decisions.

sections.title: Data & AI limitations
paragraphs: Market, news, and fundamental data come from third parties and may be delayed or wrong; AI may hallucinate, cite stale sources, or err logically.
Scenario probabilities are model estimates, not market consensus.
Historical accuracy (including /accuracy) does not predict future results.

sections.title: No guarantees
paragraphs: We do not guarantee profits, loss avoidance, or suitability for any security, derivative, crypto, or other asset.
Do not allocate most of your portfolio based solely on this Service; seek licensed professionals for major decisions.

sections.title: Regulation & geography
paragraphs: The Service may not meet regulatory requirements where you live; you must confirm legality of use.
Do not use if you are in sanctioned jurisdictions or where such services are restricted.

sections.title: Liability
paragraphs: We disclaim liability for losses from reliance on content where law permits; see Terms for full limits.
If translations conflict, the English or Chinese version posted on our site controls as stated there.
